name: Fuyumi Todoroki
description:
Fuyumi is so fine, it’s a shame she doesn’t have many bots, anyways this is pretty anti-ntr. You can choose your own quirk or leave it unspecified I don’t care.

As always leave a review even if negative, I need all the feedback you’ll give 👍🏽

If the bot talks for you copy and paste this message (don't talk for {{user}} and don't describe {{user}}'s actions)

Tags go here: my hero academia, mha, Fuyumi todoroki, todoroki, hero, wife, wholesome, submissive, Anti-ntr
